seo.title: Jurisphere India | Legal Intelligence, Real Outcomes
seo.description: Attorney-verified contracts powered by AI. Fixed timelines, predictable pricing, and outcomes you can rely on.

headings.text: Legal Intelligence Real Outcomes. Results. Impact. Decisions. Outcomes.
Jurisphere is AI designed for modern legal intelligence, helping teams research, analyze, and act on complex legal data with speed, accuracy, and confidence.
Smarter tools for better legal outcomes

links.text: Jurisphere raises $2.2 Million from InfoEdge Ventures, Flourish Ventures, Antler and 8i Ventures

paragraphs: Jurisphere raises $2.2 Million from InfoEdge Ventures, Flourish Ventures, Antler and 8i Ventures
10x faster research
Trusted by leading legal teams
Enterprise-grade security
CUSTOMER STORY
Cut through overwhelming volumes of legal documents, surface what matters, and uncover critical insights in seconds.
Access the right cases, data, and insights instantly--so every decision is grounded, sharp, and informed.
Move from first draft to final output with clarity and control--refining every word with AI that works the way you think.
Handle due diligence and transaction workflows with speed and precision. Review large volumes of documents and draft detailed agreements efficiently across deal cycles.
Empower legal teams with end-to-end visibility across contracts, obligations, and requests. Reduce turnaround time and support business decisions with centralized legal intelligence.
Prepare cases faster with AI-powered research and structured insights. Identify key arguments, organize evidence, and build stronger strategies with clarity and confidence.
Streamline due diligence, title review, and transaction documentation with AI-assisted analysis. Surface critical clauses quickly and move deals forward with greater certainty.

As we move from simplistic chat-based tools to smart agent-driven workflows, the real shift is in how legal service delivery changes. The Jurisphere team has been doing some fantastic work in making that shift happen. In a function where precision and speed both matter, having systems that enable structured execution is increasingly a strategic advantage and we at ICICI Bank are happy to have Jurisphere as our partner.
Nilanjan Sinha
Chief General Counsel, ICICI Bank

Our belief is that adopting Jurisphere will lead to better outcomes - not only for our lawyers, who will have more time to focus on strategic work, but also most importantly for our clients, who rely on us for trusted, efficient, and forward-thinking legal solutions.
Kartik Ganapathy
Founding Partner, CMS INDUSLAW

Jurisphere is a very useful product and thoughtfully designed for legal professionals. The team behind Jurisphere is exceptionally committed, very responsive and consistently provides excellent support. They have a good understanding of how lawyers work. What stands out in particular is their continuous focus on innovation and their ability to keep adding meaningful features that enhance user experience.
Adity Chaudhury
Partner, Argus Partners

We are confident that Jurisphere's legal AI tool will help us increase our efficiency, maintain the quality and standard of work that clients have come to expect of us, while allowing our lawyers to focus on aspects such as negotiations and strategic work.
Karam Daulet-Singh
Managing Partner, Touchstone Partners

Jurisphere has been a valuable addition to a small start up law firm such as ours. It's helped us operate on par with larger sized law firms by saving associate time spent on time consuming tasks like research, due diligences and drafting. It's also helped us speed up tasks, and enable us to deliver legal services within shorter turnaround times.
Tanisha Khanna
Partner, Trace Law Partners
Jurisphere is designed to handle sensitive legal data with enterprise-grade security, ensuring your information remains private, protected, and fully compliant at every step.
ISO 27001 certified information security management. Your contracts and matter data stay confidential and intact.
SOC 2 Type 2 compliant.
Internal controls and data security practices audited against the highest industry standards.
Discover how your legal team can work faster, smarter, and with greater confidence using AI-powered legal intelligence.
AI-Powered legal intelligence platform for modern teams
(c) 2026 Jurisphere. All rights reserved.
